subcodes.first_line: The Desired One beareth witness unto Him Who hath appeared with the truth and hath come from the heaven of command with manifest sovereignty. O people of Milan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المقصود لمن ظهر بالحق و اتی من سماء الامر بسلطان مبین یا اهل میلان ان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
